hook: The point of early app conversation is to discover fit, not to manufacture certainty.
body: You do not need to force a spark on demand; you need enough signal to decide whether meeting is worth it.

hook: Some men stay in endless chat because they are trying to earn permission to be liked before asking anything real.
body: Use messaging to screen for vibe, responsiveness, and mutual curiosity, then move toward a simple plan.
